query:
INSERT INTO work_run_reviews (work_run_id, pr_url, repo_full_name, review_url, review_body, review_already_exists)
             VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6)
             ON CONFLICT (work_run_id, pr_url) DO UPDATE SET
                 review_url = EXCLUDED.review_url,
                 review_body = EXCLUDED.review_body,
                 review_already_exists = EXCLUDED.review_already_exists
